_comment: Provider subscriptions (Claude Pro, ChatGPT Plus, Gemini Advanced, etc.) and free promos. The merge script combines this with OpenRouter's live pricing data.

subscriptions.name: Claude Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited messages on Sonnet 4.5, access to Haiku 4.5
subscriptions.notes: Free tier. Light usage of Claude.

subscriptions.name: Claude Pro
subscriptions.limits: 5x more usage than Free, access to Opus 4.7, all projects and artifacts

subscriptions.name: Claude Max (5x)
subscriptions.limits: 5x Pro usage

subscriptions.name: Claude Max (20x)
subscriptions.limits: 20x Pro usage

subscriptions.name: Claude Team
subscriptions.limits: Per user, min 2 seats. Central billing & admin

subscriptions.name: Claude Enterprise
subscriptions.limits: Custom pricing, SSO, audit logs, expanded context

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Free
subscriptions.limits: GPT-5 mini, limited GPT-5 access, basic image gen

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Plus
subscriptions.limits: GPT-5 access, advanced data analysis, DALL-E, file uploads, web browsing

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Pro
subscriptions.limits: Unlimited GPT-5 + o3-pro, o1 pro mode, Sora video, deep research

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Team
subscriptions.limits: Per user, workspace with admin

subscriptions.name: ChatGPT Enterprise
subscriptions.limits: Custom, SSO, SCIM, audit, unlimited GPT-5, advanced security

subscriptions.name: Gemini Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited Gemini 2.5 Pro requests, Veo image gen, Deep Research

subscriptions.name: Google AI Pro
subscriptions.limits: Expanded Gemini 2.5 Pro, Veo 3 video, Jules coding agent, 2TB Drive

subscriptions.name: Google AI Ultra
subscriptions.limits: Highest limits, Project Mariner, Veo 3, 30TB Drive, YouTube Premium

subscriptions.name: Google Workspace AI
subscriptions.limits: Add-on pricing varies by plan

subscriptions.name: Grok Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited Grok 4 queries, image gen

subscriptions.name: Grok Premium
subscriptions.limits: Higher limits, image gen, Aurora

subscriptions.name: Grok Premium+
subscriptions.limits: Highest rate limits, Grok 4 Heavy, Think Mode, DeepSearch

subscriptions.name: Grok SuperGrok
subscriptions.limits: Even higher limits, early access, multi-agent
subscriptions.notes: Direct from grok.com, no X required.

subscriptions.name: Le Chat Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited Mistral Large / Medium messages

subscriptions.name: Le Chat Pro
subscriptions.limits: Higher limits, web search, image gen (Flux), file uploads, agents

subscriptions.name: Le Chat Team
subscriptions.limits: Per user, admin console, shared workspace

subscriptions.name: Mistral Enterprise
subscriptions.limits: Custom, SSO, on-prem options

subscriptions.name: DeepSeek Free
subscriptions.limits: Web chat with V3.2 and R1, limited daily use

subscriptions.name: DeepSeek API (pay-as-you-go)
subscriptions.limits: No subscription, pay per token, very cheap

subscriptions.name: Kimi Free
subscriptions.limits: Web chat with Kimi K2.5 and K2 Thinking, limited daily

subscriptions.name: Kimi API (pay-as-you-go)
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token, Chinese pricing in ¥, OpenAI-compatible

subscriptions.name: Kimi Subscription
subscriptions.limits: Higher usage, file uploads, priority

subscriptions.name: Hailuo Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited MiniMax M3 chats per day

subscriptions.name: Hailuo Pro
subscriptions.limits: Higher M3 limits, priority

subscriptions.name: Minimax API
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token, OpenAI-compatible

subscriptions.name: MiMo Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited MiMo-VL and MiMo-7B via Xiaomi chat

subscriptions.name: MiMo API
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token

subscriptions.name: Qwen Chat Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited Qwen3-Max, Qwen3-Plus, Qwen-Coder

subscriptions.name: Qwen API (Alibaba Cloud)
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token via Bailian / Model Studio

subscriptions.name: Meta Llama (open weights)
subscriptions.limits: Open-source, self-host free
subscriptions.notes: Free for self-hosting, no first-party chat product.

subscriptions.name: meta.ai
subscriptions.limits: Limited Llama 4 access on consumer site

subscriptions.name: build.nvidia.com
subscriptions.limits: Free tier NIM API credits, then pay per token

subscriptions.name: Cohere Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited trial API keys, $5 free credits on signup

subscriptions.name: Cohere API (production)
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token, enterprise tiers

subscriptions.name: Perplexity Free
subscriptions.limits: Limited Pro searches per day

subscriptions.name: Perplexity Pro
subscriptions.limits: Unlimited Pro searches, file uploads, image gen, model picker
subscriptions.notes: Access to GPT-5, Claude, Grok, Sonar.

subscriptions.name: Perplexity Enterprise Pro
subscriptions.limits: Per user, SSO, admin

subscriptions.name: AWS Bedrock (Nova + others)
subscriptions.limits: Pay per token, no subscription required
subscriptions.notes: Nova Lite/Pro/ Premier, plus Claude, Llama, Mistral.

free_promos.notes: DeepSeek V3 free tier on OpenRouter with rate limits.
DeepSeek R1 free tier, with reasoning tokens.
Gemini 2.5 Pro has free tier in AI Studio.
Kimi K2 weights free on HuggingFace under modified MIT.
MiniMax M3 weights on HuggingFace under Apache 2.0.
